headline: A Massive Multi-Billion-Dollar Industry Merger Just Rewrote the Entire Bear Case Against McCormick: Why It’s the Ultimate Defensive Asset
summary: The bear case on McCormick (NYSE:MKC) had been a familiar story of input-cost pressure and a sluggish retail backdrop. That story changed when management announced the $44.8 billion merger with Unilever‘s (NYSE:UL) food business, layered on top of the January 75% controlling stake in McCormick de Mexico. For income investors, the question is whether a ... A Massive Multi-Billion-Dollar Industry Merger Just Rewrote the Entire Bear Case Against McCormick: Why It’s the Ultimate Defensive Asset
